name: Wild Garden
notes: Jasmine, orange blossom, and magnolia unfold over ripe peach and apricot, rounded by a whisper of bergamot and rose tea. Silky, mellow texture.

name: Vertige
notes: An intense, layered florality — jasmine, honeysuckle, and bergamot — lifted by pomelo and a bright, phosphoric sparkle reminiscent of kumquat. Crystalline acidity.

name: Cerise
notes: Strawberry and red berries wrapped in rose, magnolia, and hibiscus, finishing on a note of white wine. Elegant, silky body.

name: Mystic
notes: A defining lot: jasmine, orange blossom, and honeysuckle over mandarin and lemongrass, with violet and raspberry beneath. Velvety, balanced, long tea finish.

name: Symphony
notes: Orange blossom and strawberry meet a caramelized sweetness, with juicy stone fruit and a lingering citrus finish. Full, complex body.

name: Qw
notes: Cranberry and pomegranate lead into cherry and coffee blossom, with an exotic mangosteen note and layered, textured finish.

name: Alchimie
notes: A dense, concentrated cup: violet, lavender, and black currant, deepened by rosehip, honey, and a cognac-like richness. Complex, dried-flower finish.

name: Clair Obscur
notes: Jasmine and white muscat grape open into blood orange and strawberry, with hibiscus and a champagne-like sparkle — the cup itself shifting through red, yellow, and purple as it cools. Winey character, yellow florals.

name: Ruby Red
notes: Bright stone fruit — peach and loquat — layered with raspberry and pomegranate over a citrus-forward, lemon-candy sweetness.

name: Zenith
notes: The collection's most expressive natural: blueberry, cherry, and plum over blackcurrant and violet, with blood orange, strawberry, and a perfumed, honeyed finish.

name: Halo
notes: Muscat and raspberry give way to mandarin, peach, and jasmine, rounded by orange blossom, baked pineapple, and a lingering, structured finish.

name: Tropical Hibiscus
notes: Raspberry and blackberry meet hibiscus and dried flowers, with ripe yellow mango and banana adding a tropical, fruit-forward sweetness.

name: Qn
notes: Peach and lilac open into apricot and orange wine, with lemongrass, toasted oak, and maple syrup adding depth. Silky, mineral finish.

name: Reverie
notes: An intensely concentrated cup: date, honeysuckle, and peach meet caramel and pink guava, finishing on jasmine and a candied fruit sweetness.
